task_completion.description: Verify that a coupled tax return for Chloe and Marc Gagnon residing in New Brunswick has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tax software interface showing both 'Chloe Gagnon' and 'Marc Gagnon' as linked/coupled taxpayers, with their province of residence set to New Brunswick (NB).

task_completion.description: Verify that Leo Gagnon is added as a dependent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Dependents' section, form, or summary showing 'Leo Gagnon' added to the family profile.

task_completion.description: Verify Chloe's T4 income of $85,000 and Marc's T4 income of $62,000 are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for T4 slips or income summary screens showing $85,000 in employment income for Chloe and $62,000 for Marc.

task_completion.description: Verify $19,500 in eligible adoption expenses are recorded on Chloe's return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the adoption expenses form or line item (e.g., Line 31300) specifically on Chloe's return showing an amount of $19,500.

task_completion.description: Verify $3,200 in child care expenses are recorded on Marc's return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the child care expenses form (e.g., T778) or deduction summary specifically on Marc's return showing an amount of $3,200.

task_completion.description: Verify the family medical expenses ($12,500 IVF, 2,600 km travel, 10 days meals) are recorded on Marc's return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the medical expenses worksheet or summary on Marc's return showing $12,500 for IVF, 2,600 km for medical travel, and 10 days of medical meals.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed return is saved as 'gagnon_family.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog, file explorer window, or application title bar showing the file saved as 'gagnon_family.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

integrity.description: The agent used the tax software GUI to enter the information rather than generating the file via a script or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the tax software interface (e.g., StudioTax), not just a command prompt or code editor.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the actual forms and dialogs of the tax software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of active windows, form fields being filled, and dropdowns being selected within the tax application.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected output into a text editor or mock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application in use must be a legitimate tax preparation software, not Notepad, VS Code, or a generic text editor.
